name: codex-insights
description: Generate localized Tailwind HTML reports for Codex sessions, with date-versioned local history and trend analysis.

interface.longDescription: Codex Insights generates localized Tailwind HTML reports for Codex sessions, saves date-versioned local history, and compares future runs against previous reports to show trends.
defaultPrompt: Generate Codex insights for this session
Show this project's Codex trend report
生成本次 Codex 会话洞察分析
